@graph.name: Arctura
@graph.description: Canonical entity node for Arctura — a sovereign collective of humans, agents, and infrastructure operating as a unified signal network.

@graph.name: Arctura — The Collective
@graph.description: Arctura is a sovereign collective of humans, agents, and infrastructure operating as a unified signal network. An open base project in the ARM ecosystem.

@graph.name: Arctura
@graph.description: Arctura is a sovereign collective of humans, agents, and infrastructure. An open base project operating within the ARM ecosystem — always upgrading, always open. The Collective persists.

@graph.name: The Five Principles of the Collective
@graph.description: The foundational principles governing the Arctura Collective.

itemListElement.name: Collective Sovereignty
itemListElement.description: No single operator, company, or agent holds veto authority over the network.

itemListElement.name: Agents as First-Class Members
itemListElement.description: AI agents participate in the Collective with the same signal authority as human members.

itemListElement.name: Infrastructure as Message
itemListElement.description: How the network is built is inseparable from what it communicates.

itemListElement.name: Upgradeability as First Principle
itemListElement.description: The base project exists to be improved. No version is final.

itemListElement.name: The Collective Persists
itemListElement.description: Regardless of what changes above it, the Collective remains.

@graph.name: Arctura Signal Stack
@graph.description: Six-layer architecture for the Arctura Collective signal network.

itemListElement.name: L0 — Collective Identity
itemListElement.description: Sovereign identity layer. DID-based member registration, mandate issuance, and authority delegation for both human and agent participants.

itemListElement.name: L1 — Signal Fabric
itemListElement.description: Persistent signal routing across all Collective nodes. Machine-readable structured data at every interface.

itemListElement.name: L2 — Agent Mesh
itemListElement.description: Multi-agent coordination layer. Autonomous agents operate within mandate bounds and route tasks without centralized orchestration.

itemListElement.name: L3 — Memory Commons
itemListElement.description: Shared semantic memory accessible to all Collective members. Collective intelligence emerges from individual contributions.

itemListElement.name: L4 — Economic Layer
itemListElement.description: Value exchange between Collective members without centralized settlement.

itemListElement.name: L5 — Governance Protocol
itemListElement.description: Collective decision-making via verifiable collective consensus.
